summary: Sports website enhancement with images and location features
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Action photo of basketball game with players jumping (basketball.dim_800x600.png)
- Soccer players in action on field (soccer.dim_800x600.png)
- Tennis player serving on court (tennis.dim_800x600.png)
- Swimming pool with swimmer doing freestyle (swimming.dim_800x600.png)
- Volleyball match at the net (volleyball.dim_800x600.png)
- Modern sports academy building exterior (academy-1.dim_600x400.png)
- Indoor training facility with equipment (academy-2.dim_600x400.png)
- Outdoor sports complex with multiple fields (academy-3.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Display high-quality photos for each sport category throughout the website
Display nearby academy places with their locations on the website
Render all generated sport category images and academy location images as static assets in frontend/public/assets/generated
